title: Their Name Is Blåhaj
description: Renames the Blåhaj mod's Soft Toy Shark to Blåhaj
body:
Their Name Is Blåhaj is a resource pack that renames the plushies from [the Blåhaj mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/blahaj) (and many of its descendants) to their respective IKEA names.

Ignore any warning saying that the resource pack is for an older or newer version; it's just a language file, it'll be fine :3
